content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Fixed the two remaining lifecycle gaps in runtime code. `src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs` now derives the active running-attempt boundary from the snapshot’s `active_run.started_at` when a resumed attempt crashes after writing `run.json`/`run.pid` but before `run_resumed` is durable, so stale status/stop/resume no longer inherit an older terminal event from the previous attempt. `src/cli/run.rs` now reconciles stale `Running` snapshots after claiming the fresh writer lease even when no stranded writer-lock owner file remains, so `run resume` repairs stale completed runs without depending on leftover lock metadata. Added CLI and unit regressions for the unjournaled resume window and the no-owner stale-completed resume path.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Patched running-attempt reconciliation in `src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs` so the snapshot’s active-run `started_at` acts as the fallback attempt boundary when `run_resumed` was never durably appended.
2. [Completed] Updated `src/cli/run.rs` so `run resume` performs stale-running reconciliation after acquiring the writer guard whenever the originally observed snapshot was stale, even if no stale writer-lock owner file is still present.
3. [Completed] Added regressions in `tests/cli.rs` and `tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs` for the unjournaled resume crash window and stale completed recovery without lock leftovers, then reran focused and broad validation.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `cargo test --test cli run_status_ignores_terminal_journal_events_before_unjournaled_resume_snapshot_started_at -- --exact` passed.
- `cargo test --features test-stub --test unit workflow_engine_test::status_reconciliation_ignores_terminal_events_before_unjournaled_resume_snapshot_started_at -- --exact` passed.
- `cargo test --features test-stub --test cli run_resume_reconciles_completed_stale_running_snapshot_without_writer_lock_owner -- --exact` passed.
- `cargo test --features test-stub --test cli run_resume_preserves_completed_journal_outcome_for_stale_running_snapshot -- --exact` passed.
- `cargo test --test cli run_stop_preserves_completed_journal_outcome_for_stale_running_snapshot -- --exact` passed.
- `cargo test` passed.
- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` failed only on pre-existing repo-wide lint findings outside this lifecycle patch.

## Outstanding Risks

- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` is still blocked by pre-existing repository-wide lint debt outside this patch, with current findings in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/project.rs`, `src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs`, `src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs`, and `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs`.
- The worktree already had unrelated live-state changes under `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/`; those files were left untouched.
